items.name: flask of whale oil
items.spellBias: steady flame, deep sea, rendered warmth
items.description: Clear oil rendered in the whaleholds, burning slow and bright. Light against the long dark, or fuel for warmer work.

items.name: powdered scrimshaw
items.description: Bone dust from the scrimshaw yards, thick with half-carved stories. A spell reagent that remembers being a record.

items.name: lump of ambergris
items.spellBias: deep sea, fixing scent, treasured rarity
items.description: A waxy grey lump worth a boat's wages, coughed up by the deep. Fixes a scent, a spell, or a fortune.

items.name: shard of brine-ice
items.description: A shard of salt-ice that refuses to melt in the hand. Cold kept for a spell, or a cold thing to keep.

items.name: whalebone corslet
items.spellBias: bone, deep cold, a whale's endurance
items.description: A corslet of shaped whalebone plates, carved with the deeds of the boat that took the whale. Cold-proof and quietly boastful.

items.name: carved scrimshaw focus
items.description: A palm of whalebone scrimshawed with a single deed. Focused, it sharpens a spell toward memory, witness, and old debts.

items.name: bone-tipped harpoon
items.spellBias: the thrown strike, deep water, the hunt
items.description: A long harpoon with a barbed bone head and a coil of line. Made for whales; adequate for lesser trouble.

items.name: sealskin storm-cloak
items.spellBias: warmth, shrugging off storms, the grey sea
items.description: A heavy sealskin cloak that sheds spray and holds warmth through a Bralli night.

items.name: tarred rope harness
items.description: A harness of tarred rope for winch-work and cliff paths. It keeps a body attached to the world in bad weather.

items.name: skin of storm-ale
items.description: Dark, salty ale brewed for storm-nights in the tale-halls. It warms the body and starts the stories.

items.name: hardtack and dried fish
items.description: A voyager's ration of iron-hard biscuit and salt fish. Grim, filling, and everywhere in the whaleholds.

items.name: scrimshaw witness-record
items.spellBias: witnessed truth, carved testimony, a settled debt
items.description: A carved bone plaque recording who witnessed what — a Bralli court's memory. Read it and a disputed story acquires an owner.

items.name: tide-warning slate
items.spellBias: warning, the mountain pass, when not to sail
items.description: A slate of tide and pass warnings chalked by harbour hands: which routes drown, which passes close, and when.

items.name: bone luck-token
items.spellBias: luck, a safe return, small superstition
items.description: A whalebone token carved with a boat and a wave, pressed on departing sailors by those who want them back.
